title: Creamy Mushroom & Spinach Pasta with Garlic Bread
description: This creamy and comforting pasta dish is packed with flavor and healthy spinach, making it a perfect family meal. Served with warm garlic bread, it's a quick and easy weeknight dinner that even picky eaters will love.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain and set aside, reserving about 1/2 cup of pasta water.
While pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a large skillet or pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until softened and lightly browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the fresh spinach and cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Pour in the heavy cream and vegetable broth. Bring to a gentle simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken slightly.
Stir in the grated Parmesan cheese until melted and smooth. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet with the sauce. Toss to coat evenly. If the sauce is too thick, add a little reserved pasta water until desired consistency is reached.
Warm the garlic bread according to package instructions.
Serve the creamy mushroom and spinach pasta immediately with the garlic bread on the side.
tips: For a smoother sauce, blend a portion of the cooked mushrooms and spinach with a little broth before adding to the cream.
If kids are hesitant about mushrooms, chop them very finely or use a food processor to hide them in the sauce.
Add a pinch of nutmeg to the sauce for an extra layer of flavor that complements the cream and spinach.
